title: Grilled Sirloin Steak with Filipino Marinade
description: A flavorful and juicy sirloin steak marinated in a traditional Filipino mixture of soy sauce, vinegar, and spices. Perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine soy sauce, apple cider vinegar, brown sugar, garlic, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
Place the sirloin steak in a large ziplock bag or a shallow dish. Pour the marinade over the steak and massage to coat.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Remove the steak from the marinade and let it sit at room temperature for 15 minutes.
Grill the steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 130°F - 135°F for medium-rare.
Let the steak rest for 5-10 minutes before slicing and serving.
